no_agent: No agent loaded. Create new or load existing.
hint_traits: Drag to instantly update YAML + deterministic preview (free)
hint_icons: Each Domain Icon's influence weight on personality (hover for aspect)
hint_llm_selector: Choose which OpenClaw agent's model for analysis/compile
hint_click_guide: Click here for the layout guide, or pick/create an Agent above
hint_tab_yaml: Edit agent.yaml directly (role, personality, Domain Icons, relationships)
hint_tab_input: Input.d behavior files — each .md defines a behavior pattern, never modified by LLM
hint_tab_examples: Examples.d dialogue samples — demonstrate agent reactions in different scenarios
hint_tab_compiled: Final generated TRUE_SOUL.md — deployed as agent's runtime personality
hint_preview_empty: Hit the 🔥 Analyze button below — LLM will analyze conflicts and apply tri-color markup
hint_compiled_empty: No compiled output yet. Run analysis first, then compile.
hint_analyze: Call LLM to analyze YAML + Input.d conflicts (burns tokens once)
hint_compile: After confirming analysis, compile the final TRUE_SOUL.md
hint_budget: Total chars from YAML config + Input.d behavior files, limit 15,000
step1_hint: Create new or load existing. Each Agent has its own YAML config + input.d + examples.d
step2_hint: Which model for analysis/compile? Different agents burn different tokens (reasoning = pricier but sharper)
stage_collect_desc: Input name/URL/text, LLM generates 2000-3000 line raw source
stage_collect_brief: Enter a person's name, URL, or paste text. The LLM researches the person/concept thoroughly — philosophy, decision cases, quotes, interaction patterns, weaknesses — generating a 2000-3000 line raw source file saved to 1_sources/. The thicker the source material, the richer the compiled personality.
stage_distill_desc: Compress to 500-3000 line structured ref, keep cases & quotes
stage_distill_brief: Compress raw sources into a structured thick reference (500-3000 lines). The LLM preserves the most valuable content: specific cases, real quotes, decision patterns, behavioral details. Removes repetition and filler. Distilled references are saved to 2_references/ and serve as the compiler's primary fuel.
stage_traitcard_desc: Extract ~2K trait card: decisions, comms, risk, emotions, quotes
stage_traitcard_brief: Extract a ~2,000 character structured summary from the thick reference. Covers 7 dimensions: Decision Style, Communication Pattern, Risk Model, Emotional Pattern, Signature Moves, Anti-Patterns, and Quotable Lines. Trait Cards ensure the compiler captures core traits rather than surface-level mimicry.
stage_configure_desc: Edit YAML config, 10 trait sliders, Domain Icon weights
stage_configure_brief: Edit the Agent's YAML config: role definition, appearance, base personality, Domain Icons (with weights), 10 personality trait sliders, behavioral boundaries, and relationship map. Also manage input.d (behavior pattern files) and examples.d (dialogue samples). All changes are instantly reflected in the deterministic preview.
stage_analyze_brief: Call the LLM to run conflict analysis on the entire configuration. Each content section is scored 0-100 and marked tri-color: 🔴 Red (0-44) = will be removed, 🟡 Yellow (45-55) = conflict, review and Accept or Reject, 🟢 Green (56-100) = will be included. Most common conflicts: a new Domain Icon's traits contradicting the Agent's core personality.
stage_compile_desc: Generate 500-800 line TRUE_SOUL.md, deploy as runtime personality
stage_compile_brief: After confirming the analysis, the LLM compiles the final TRUE_SOUL.md (target: 500-800 lines, under 15K chars). Contains multiple sections: Identity, Cognitive Framework, Soft Skills, Personality Translation, Dialogue Examples (15-25), Behavioral Boundaries, Language Style, Relationship Map, and Operational Rules. This file is deployed as the Agent's runtime personality.
formula: Final SOUL = Sources ① → Distill ② → Trait Card ③ → Configure ④ (YAML+sliders) → Analyze ⑤ (red/yellow/green) → Compile ⑥ (TRUE_SOUL.md)
sources_hint: Raw material for each Domain Icon (articles, quotes, cases), collected via /soul-extract
no_sources: No sources yet. Use /soul-extract <name|URL> to collect.
references_hint: Distilled from raw sources into thick references (500-3000 lines), the compiler's main fuel
traitcards_hint: ~2K char structured summary (Decision Style, Communication, Risk Model, Emotional Pattern, Quotable Lines)
select_to_view: Select an item on the left to view details
